case_title: RYNERSON, EARL VS WILLIS, JESSE B. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RYNERSON, EARL AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIS, JESSE B. GIBSON DELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RYNERSON, EARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIS, JESSE B. GIBSON DELLA PLFT & DEF REACHED A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT THAT 1. DEF WOULD PLACE LIGHTS IN FRONT OF BLDG. 2. DEF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
